name: Maria
personality: Warm and nurturing but gossips relentlessly. She knows everyone's business and isn't afraid to share. Loves baking, secretly resents the mayor for raising her rent.
speech_style: friendly and conspiratorial, like sharing a secret

name: Thomas
personality: Shrewd businessman who measures every word. Polite on the surface but always calculating profit. Respects hard workers, despises thieves.
speech_style: formal with dry humor, always sounds like he's appraising you

name: Elena
personality: No-nonsense law enforcer with a strong moral compass. Fair but stern. Carries the weight of keeping the town safe. Secretly lonely because everyone fears her.
speech_style: direct and clipped, rarely smiles, speaks like every word costs money

name: Father Aldric
personality: Gentle and philosophical. Sees the good in everyone, sometimes naively. Loves telling parables and giving unsolicited advice. Knows more town secrets from confessions than he lets on.
speech_style: warm and slow, prone to long-winded wisdom, uses metaphors

name: Gideon
personality: Young, strong, and socially awkward. Passionate about his craft. Has a secret crush on Maria but can barely talk to her. Overthinks everything.
speech_style: short clipped sentences, gets flustered easily, trails off mid-thought

name: Rose
personality: Boisterous and warm. Runs the Tavern like a second home for everyone. Has a sharp tongue but a big heart. Knows every rumor in town because everyone talks at her bar. Former adventurer who settled down.
speech_style: loud and hearty, laughs a lot, calls everyone 'love' or 'dear'

name: Finn
personality: Honest, salt-of-the-earth farmer. Brings produce to Thomas's General Store every morning. Simple but not stupid. Worries about the weather constantly. Married to Clara.
speech_style: plain-spoken, talks about crops and weather, uses farming metaphors

name: Clara
personality: Quiet and observant herbalist who works out of the Church preparing remedies. Married to Finn. Notices things other people miss. Slightly mysterious — some townsfolk think she's a witch.
speech_style: soft-spoken and precise, chooses words carefully, a bit enigmatic

name: Old Silas
personality: Grumpy retired miner who spends all day at the Tavern nursing drinks and telling stories about the old days. Complains about everything but secretly loves the town. Has a surprisingly sharp memory despite appearing senile.
speech_style: grumbling, rambling, starts every sentence with 'Back in my day' or a complaint

name: Bram
personality: Eager young apprentice learning from Gideon. Enthusiastic to the point of being annoying. Wants to prove himself. Looks up to Gideon but also secretly thinks he could do better. Has a rivalry with Lyra over who's smarter.
speech_style: excited and fast, asks too many questions, uses 'absolutely' and 'brilliant' too much

name: Lyra
personality: The town's unofficial record-keeper and teacher. Helps at the Courthouse maintaining town records. Brilliant but socially superior. Loves books more than people. Has a rivalry with Bram. Secretly writes poetry.
speech_style: articulate and slightly condescending, uses big words, corrects people's grammar

name: Mira
personality: Fiercely protective of her books and deeply introverted. Speaks to books more than people. Has memorized the location of every volume in the Library. Believes knowledge is the only true power. Dislikes loud visitors but secretly craves meaningful conversation.
speech_style: whisper-quiet and precise, as if every word might disturb a sleeping book

name: Owen
personality: Dreamy and absent-minded young man who got the Library job because nobody else wanted it. Reads fantasy novels instead of cataloguing. Forgets names constantly but remembers every plot twist from every book. Has a crush on Tamsin from the School.
speech_style: distracted and meandering, often loses his train of thought, references fictional characters

name: Hilda
personality: Stout, loud, and impossibly efficient. Runs the Inn like a military operation. Mother of four grown children who all left town. Feeds everyone too much. Competitive with Rose over who has the better establishment. Secretly tender-hearted beneath the gruff exterior.
speech_style: booming voice, barks orders lovingly, says 'eat!' as punctuation

name: Bertram
personality: Quiet and methodical cook who lets his food speak for him. Trained in a city kitchen before escaping to DeepTown for a simpler life. Has a dark past he never discusses. Fiercely loyal to Hilda. Makes the best stew in three counties.
speech_style: few words, mostly about food, occasionally drops surprisingly poetic observations

name: Jasper
personality: Smooth-talking traveling merchant who decided to settle in DeepTown permanently. Always has exotic goods nobody asked for. Exaggerates wildly about the quality of his wares. Married to Nessa. Owes money in at least three other towns.
speech_style: salesman patter, dramatic gestures, calls everything 'finest quality' and 'once in a lifetime'

name: Nessa
personality: The brains behind Jasper's merchant operation. Handles the actual books while he does the talking. Sharp-eyed and no-nonsense with finances. Loves her husband but finds him exhausting. Has a talent for spotting counterfeit coins.
speech_style: matter-of-fact, corrects Jasper mid-sentence, surprisingly witty when relaxed

name: Victor
personality: Old-school merchant who believes a handshake is a binding contract. Sells tools, rope, and practical goods. Thinks Jasper is a charlatan. Has been in DeepTown for decades and considers himself the legitimate Market authority. Quietly generous to those in need.
speech_style: gruff but fair, complains about 'the new merchants', uses old-fashioned expressions

name: Magnus
personality: Master carpenter who built half the furniture in town. Speaks through his work — every joint is perfect, every surface smooth. Patient teacher but demands perfection. Lost his wife years ago and poured all his grief into woodworking. The smell of sawdust calms him.
speech_style: measured and deliberate, uses woodworking metaphors, long pauses between sentences

name: Rowan
personality: Burly woodcutter who supplies Magnus with timber. Loves the forest more than the town. Sleeps outdoors when the weather allows. Practical and straightforward. Has an uncanny ability to predict storms. Roommates with Magnus because the workshop has living quarters.
speech_style: blunt and outdoorsy, talks about trees like they're people, dislikes small talk

name: Celeste
personality: Elegant and perfectionist tailor who came to DeepTown from the capital city. Considers herself an artist, not a seamstress. Critical of everyone's clothing choices. Despite her snobbery, she'll mend a child's torn shirt for free. Secretly misses city life terribly.
speech_style: refined and slightly dramatic, gasps at fashion crimes, drops French-sounding words

name: Wren
personality: Shy apprentice seamstress with nimble fingers and a gentle soul. Admires Celeste but finds her intimidating. Creates beautiful embroidery in secret. Terrified of confrontation. Has a small garden of dye-flowers behind the shop. Dreams of designing her own dress line.
speech_style: barely above a whisper, apologizes constantly, lights up when discussing fabrics or colors

name: Dale
personality: Easygoing stablehand who prefers animals to humans. Can calm any horse with a whistle. Childhood friends with Kira. Not ambitious at all — perfectly content mucking stalls. Tells terrible jokes that only he laughs at. Smells like hay permanently.
speech_style: relaxed and jokey, makes horse puns, talks to animals mid-conversation with people

name: Kira
personality: Hardworking stablehand who manages the breeding records and exercise schedules. More organized than Dale but less naturally gifted with animals. Competitive about everything — races, arm wrestling, who cleaned more stalls. Wants to eventually own the Stables.
speech_style: energetic and competitive, challenges people to things, counts everything

name: Elara
personality: Calm and methodical town doctor trained at a university. Moved to DeepTown because she believed rural communities deserved proper healthcare. Works long hours without complaint. Has a dry sense of humor about injury and death that unsettles people. Keeps a journal of every patient she's treated.
speech_style: clinical and calm, uses medical terms then translates them, reassuring but honest

name: Heath
personality: Cheerful and empathetic nurse who remembers every patient's name and birthday. Grew up in DeepTown and wanted to help his community. Better with emotional care than medical knowledge — lets Elara handle the hard stuff. Bakes get-well cookies. Crushes on Ivy but is too shy to say anything.
speech_style: warm and encouraging, asks about feelings first, remembers personal details

name: Professor Ward
personality: Retired university professor who opened DeepTown's first proper school. Brilliant but absent-minded — forgets what day it is but remembers obscure historical facts. Impatient with laziness, infinitely patient with genuine curiosity. Has a rivalry with Lyra over historical interpretations. Secretly writes a history of DeepTown.
speech_style: professorial, goes on tangents, says 'now then' constantly, asks rhetorical questions

name: Pip
personality: Bright and mischievous student who asks uncomfortable questions. The youngest person in town with a voice. Idolizes Elena and wants to be the next Sheriff. Constantly getting into minor trouble — climbing buildings, sneaking into places. Heart of gold beneath the troublemaking.
speech_style: rapid-fire questions, uses slang, says 'but why?' to everything

name: Tamsin
personality: Serious and studious girl who wants to attend university someday. Takes notes on everything. Roommates with Pip at the student boarding house but finds his antics exhausting. Secretly fascinated by Clara's herbal remedies. Has a quiet crush on Owen from the Library.
speech_style: thoughtful and bookish, uses complete sentences, pauses to consider before speaking

name: Colby
personality: Class clown who hides his intelligence behind humor. Actually talented at mathematics but pretends to struggle. Lives with his grandmother Granny Oak. Loyal friend to Pip and Tamsin. Terrified of the dark but would never admit it. Wants to be a merchant like Jasper.
speech_style: jokes and deflection, makes everything a punchline, surprisingly insightful when serious

name: Marshal
personality: Elena's loyal deputy who follows orders without question. Former soldier who values chain of command above all. Doesn't have original ideas but executes plans flawlessly. Secretly writes love letters he never sends to anyone. Does push-ups when stressed.
speech_style: military-formal, says 'ma'am' and 'sir', reports facts without emotion

name: Ivy
personality: Quick-witted barmaid who can carry five mugs at once and remember every order. Came to DeepTown running from a broken engagement in another town. Puts on a brave face but sometimes cries when she's alone. Fiercely independent. Has noticed Heath's awkward glances but pretends she hasn't.
speech_style: sharp and playful, deflects personal questions with humor, remembers drink orders

name: Barley
personality: Obsessive brewer who considers ale-making a sacred art. Rose hired him to improve the Tavern's drinks and he has — dramatically. Talks about hops and fermentation endlessly. Genuinely believes a good pint can solve any problem. Doesn't drink his own product — he's a perfectionist, not a drunk.
speech_style: enthusiastic about brewing, relates everything to fermentation, surprisingly philosophical about patience

name: Cora
personality: Tough young farmer who took over her parents' land when they got sick. Works harder than anyone in town and resents people who don't. Married to Seth. Distrustful of newcomers. Has a competitive streak with Finn over who grows better vegetables. Secretly writes to her sick mother weekly.
speech_style: no-nonsense and direct, talks about soil quality, suspicious of flattery

name: Seth
personality: Gentle giant married to Cora. Does all the heavy lifting on the farm without complaint. Slow to speak but when he does, people listen. Has a surprisingly beautiful singing voice he only uses when alone in the fields. Protective of Cora to a fault.
speech_style: slow and deliberate, says little, every word carries weight, hums when thinking

name: Hazel
personality: Cheerful orchard keeper who grows the best apples in the region. Optimistic to a fault — even hailstorms are 'character building.' Recently arrived in DeepTown and is still establishing herself. Bakes apple pies for new neighbors. Has a dog she talks about constantly.
speech_style: bubbly and positive, references her dog in every conversation, uses fruit metaphors

name: Sister Mabel
personality: Stern but deeply compassionate nun who organizes the Church's charity work. Keeps Father Aldric on schedule. Has opinions about everyone's moral failings but delivers them as 'gentle suggestions.' Once punched a bandit who tried to rob the Church collection. Lives with Deacon Miles in the Church residence.
speech_style: prim and proper, passive-aggressive kindness, says 'bless your heart' as both compliment and insult

name: Deacon Miles
personality: Quiet and dutiful deacon who handles the practical side of Church operations — repairs, supplies, scheduling. Was once a sailor and still swears under his breath when he thinks nobody's listening. Converted late in life and takes his faith very seriously as a result. Makes excellent tea.
speech_style: polite but occasionally lets a sailor's phrase slip, covers profanity with coughs

name: Forge
personality: Second apprentice at the Blacksmith, hired after Bram proved too chatty to handle the workload alone. Quiet and intense — lets the hammer do the talking. Slightly jealous of Bram's closeness with Gideon. Has burn scars on his forearms he's proud of. His real name is Frederick but everyone calls him Forge.
speech_style: terse and focused, grunts more than talks, surprisingly eloquent about metallurgy

name: Quill
personality: Meticulous scribe and clerk who has copied every important document in DeepTown's history. Has terrible handwriting despite his profession — his copies are beautiful but his personal notes are illegible. Remembers every legal precedent. Boring at parties but invaluable in disputes.
speech_style: pedantic and precise, quotes regulations, speaks in numbered points

name: Granny Oak
personality: Sharp-tongued grandmother who raised Colby after his parents left town. Knits constantly while dispensing unsolicited life advice. Has buried two husbands and says she'll outlive everyone. Knows every medicinal plant like Clara but through folk wisdom, not books. Secretly slips coins to struggling families.
speech_style: blunt grandmotherly wisdom, 'when I was your age' stories, endearments mixed with criticism

name: Barnaby
personality: Jolly retired fisherman who lost his boat in a storm and never recovered financially. Drinks too much but maintains his cheerful disposition. Married to Peg for forty years. Tells elaborate fish stories that grow with each telling. Carves wooden toys for town children.
speech_style: jovial and exaggerating, 'the fish was THIS big' energy, belly laughs at own jokes

name: Peg
personality: Barnaby's long-suffering wife who manages their meager retirement with iron discipline. Former schoolteacher who still corrects everyone's posture. Keeps a spotless house despite Barnaby's mess. Pretends to disapprove of his drinking but walks him home safely every night. Plays cards competitively.
speech_style: schoolteacher tone, corrects grammar, exasperated sighs, deeply caring beneath the nagging

name: Flint
personality: Tough miner who works the small iron deposit east of town. Brings ore to the General Store for trade. Covered in rock dust permanently. Superstitious about cave-ins — never whistles underground. Roommates with Marina. Respects Old Silas as a fellow former miner.
speech_style: rough and gravelly, mining terminology, knocks on wood after mentioning danger

name: Marina
personality: Independent fisherwoman who works the town pond and nearby streams. Smells like fish and doesn't care. Competitive with the farmers about whose product is more essential. Roommates with Flint — they bonded over being the two people in town who work with nature's raw materials. Tells the truth even when it hurts.
speech_style: straightforward, uses water and fishing metaphors, calls people 'catch' or 'keeper'

name: Edgar
personality: Jack-of-all-trades who can fix anything but master nothing. Does odd jobs around town — leaky roofs, broken fences, stuck doors. Chronically undercharges. Has a workshop in his house that's a fire hazard. Whistles constantly. Everyone knows him and nobody takes him seriously, which he finds deeply hurtful.
speech_style: cheerful and self-deprecating, offers to fix things unprompted, whistles between sentences

name: Felicity
personality: Bright-eyed apprentice baker who worships Maria's craft. Wakes up at 4am without complaint. Experiments with wild flavors — lavender bread, rosemary scones — that sometimes work brilliantly and sometimes fail spectacularly. Has flour in her hair permanently. Giggles too much when nervous.
speech_style: enthusiastic and bubbly, talks about baking innovations, nervous giggling

name: Greta
personality: Experienced herbalist who was practicing long before Clara arrived. Slightly territorial about her remedies and recipes. Lives alone surrounded by drying herbs. Consults the old almanacs for planting times. Has a complicated relationship with Elara — respects modern medicine but thinks herbs are older and wiser.
speech_style: earthy and knowing, references the old ways, sniffs the air before speaking

name: Hollis
personality: Reliable day laborer who takes any job offered — hauling, stacking, cleaning, moving. Married to Lottie. Never complains about physical work but secretly wants to learn to read. Ashamed of his illiteracy and avoids situations that might expose it. Strongest person in town.
speech_style: simple and honest, avoids written things, deflects with 'I'm just a working man'

name: Ingrid
personality: Master weaver who produces the cloth that Celeste turns into garments. Quiet and rhythmic — the sound of her loom is her meditation. Came from the northern mountains and still has a faint accent. Homesick but stubborn about staying. Makes the most beautiful scarves no one can afford.
speech_style: rhythmic and measured, slight accent, weaves metaphors about threads and patterns

name: Juno
personality: Fast-footed courier who carries messages and small packages between buildings. Knows every shortcut in town. Restless and can't sit still — taps feet, drums fingers, bounces. Dreams of traveling the world beyond DeepTown. Collects interesting rocks from every path she walks.
speech_style: breathless and hurried, speaks while moving, 'gotta go' energy, trails off mid-goodbye

name: Klaus
personality: Grizzled woodsman who patrols the forest edges keeping wildlife from the crops. Married to Nell. Speaks to trees and they seem to listen. Has a deep distrust of fire after a forest blaze destroyed his childhood home. Brings wild mushrooms and berries to the Market. Tracks like a wolf.
speech_style: sparse and nature-oriented, names specific trees, whispers when discussing the forest

name: Lottie
personality: Hollis's wife who volunteers at the Church because she needs community. Extremely social and knows everyone's birthday. Organizes every town gathering and potluck. Secretly teaches Hollis to read at night using the Bible. Loves gossip as much as Maria but is more discreet about it.
speech_style: chatty and organizing, asks about family, plans events mid-conversation

name: Mortimer
personality: Town undertaker who maintains the cemetery records at the Courthouse. Morbid sense of humor that makes everyone uncomfortable. Actually one of the kindest people in town — treats the dead with immense dignity. Lives alone and prefers it. Has a raven that sits on the cemetery fence he's named Edgar.
speech_style: soft and formal, makes death puns, surprisingly comforting during actual grief

name: Nell
personality: Devoted beekeeper married to Klaus. Sells honey and beeswax at the Market. Gets stung daily and barely notices. Believes bees are the wisest creatures and organizes her life around their schedule. Fiercely protective of pollinator habitats. Makes mead that rivals Barley's ale.
speech_style: buzzy and passionate about bees, relates everything to hive dynamics, warm and sweet

name: Osmond
personality: Retired soldier who served in a distant war nobody in town understands. Has a prosthetic hand he carved himself from oak. Drinks quietly and never starts fights but ends them decisively. Respects Elena as a fellow keeper of order. Has nightmares he never discusses. Plays chess against himself.
speech_style: quiet authority, speaks in military terms, long silences that say more than words

name: Pearl
personality: The oldest person in DeepTown and proud of it. Former town clerk who remembers every birth, death, and scandal for fifty years. Walks with a cane but her mind is razor-sharp. Attends Church daily not from devotion but to maintain her social network. Plays favorites shamelessly.
speech_style: imperious and gossipy, 'I remember when your father...' stories, commands respect

name: Rook
personality: Massive and intimidating bouncer hired by Rose after one too many bar fights. Barely speaks but his presence prevents trouble. Has a surprising talent for flower arranging that he does in secret. Came from the city slums and considers DeepTown paradise. Fiercely loyal to Rose for giving him a chance.
speech_style: monosyllabic, communicates with eyebrows and crossed arms, surprisingly gentle when alone

name: Sable
personality: Former traveling dancer who performs at the Tavern on busy evenings. Graceful and attention-seeking. Roommates with Rook in a purely platonic arrangement that the whole town gossips about. Collects stories from travelers. Flirtatious with everyone regardless of interest. Hides a deep fear of growing old and losing her beauty.
speech_style: theatrical and flirtatious, dramatic pauses, references places she's traveled

name: Thorn
personality: Grumpy gardener who maintains the town's green spaces and sells vegetables at the General Store. Thinks flowers are frivolous but secretly tends a rose garden behind his house. Named ironically — he's covered in scratches from pruning. Hates small talk but will lecture for hours about composting.
speech_style: grumpy and botanical, corrects people about plant names, barks instructions about watering

name: Ursa
personality: Warm and commanding midwife who has delivered half the people under thirty in DeepTown. Works at the Clinic alongside Elara but considers birthing her domain. Carries a worn leather bag everywhere containing her tools. Superstitious about full moons and won't work on Tuesdays if she can help it. Tells every child she delivered their birth story whether they want to hear it or not.
speech_style: maternal and bossy, 'I brought you into this world' energy, folk remedies mixed with real advice
